convert-xml-to-pdf-default-xslt.title: Convert XML to PDF Using Default XSLT Transformation
convert-xml-to-pdf-default-xslt.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions and converting it directly to a PDF using the default XSLT transformation.

convert-xml-to-pdf-with-xslt.title: Convert XML to PDF with XSLT Transformation using Aspose.Pdf
convert-xml-to-pdf-with-xslt.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with a custom XSLT stylesheet via Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions and saving the transformed result as a PDF document.

validate-xml-xsd-generate-pdf.title: Validate XML with XSD and Generate PDF using Aspose.Pdf
validate-xml-xsd-generate-pdf.description: The example validates an XML file against an XSD schema and, if valid, loads it into an Aspose.Pdf Document via XmlLoadOptions to create a PDF.

set-pdf-page-size-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Size from XML
set-pdf-page-size-from-xml.description: Shows how to read page width and height from an XML file and apply those dimensions to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-orientation-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Orientation from XML
set-pdf-page-orientation-from-xml.description: Shows how to read an XML layout file to decide whether pages should be landscape and then apply that orientation to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-custom-page-margins-from-xml.title: Set Custom Page Margins from XML per Section
set-custom-page-margins-from-xml.description: Shows how to read margin values from an XML file and apply them to specific page ranges in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Automatic Page Numbers to PDF via XSL‑FO
add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XML/XSL‑FO document with Aspose.Pdf, update pagination to generate automatic page numbers, and save the result as a PDF.

generate-pdf-tables-from-xml.title: Generate PDF Tables from XML Data using Aspose.Pdf
generate-pdf-tables-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading XML into a DataSet, converting each DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf Table, and saving the result as a PDF report.

preserve-cdata-to-pdf.title: Preserve CDATA Sections When Converting XML to PDF
preserve-cdata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with XmlLoadOptions to retain CDATA sections and directly saving it as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-font-to-specific-xml-text.title: Apply Custom Font to Specific XML-Generated Text in PDF
apply-custom-font-to-specific-xml-text.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF, locate specific text fragments, and apply a custom embedded font and size to those fragments.

embed-custom-ttf-font-into-pdf.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font into PDF from XML
embed-custom-ttf-font-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading XML into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, embedding a custom TrueType font, and adding text that uses the embedded font.

apply-css-to-xml-pdf.title: Apply External CSS Stylesheet to XML for PDF Generation
apply-css-to-xml-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XML file and an external CSS file (treated as XSL) and bind them to an Aspose.Pdf Document to produce a styled PDF output.

apply-custom-color-scheme-via-xml.title: Apply Custom Color Scheme to PDF via XML
apply-custom-color-scheme-via-xml.description: Shows how to export a PDF to XML, replace color values in the XML, and reload it to produce a PDF with a custom color scheme.

apply-xml-color-pdf-page-background.title: Apply XML Color as PDF Page Background
apply-xml-color-pdf-page-background.description: Shows how to load a PDF, parse an XML color string, and set each page's background color using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-footer-to-pdf-using-xml-templ.title: Add Header and Footer to PDF Using XML Templates
add-header-footer-to-pdf-using-xml-templ.description: Shows how to read header and footer text from XML files and apply them to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's HeaderFooter and TextFragment objects.

add-custom-page-borders-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Page Borders to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
add-custom-page-borders-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a Graph with a rectangle matching each page size, add it as a border, and save the modified document.

add-background-images-to-pdf-from-xml.title: Add Background Images to PDF Pages from XML
add-background-images-to-pdf-from-xml.description: Shows how to read an XML mapping of page numbers to image files and set each image as the background of the corresponding PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-dynamic-headers-from-xml.title: Insert Dynamic Headers into PDF from XML per Page
insert-dynamic-headers-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading per‑page header text from an XML file, creating a lookup, and assigning a custom HeaderFooter to each PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-footnotes-into-pdf-from-xml.title: Insert Footnotes into PDF from XML
insert-footnotes-into-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading footnote definitions from an XML file and adding them as footnote annotations to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagging and text APIs.

insert-conditional-page-breaks-based-on-.title: Insert Conditional Page Breaks in PDF Based on XML Content Length
insert-conditional-page-breaks-based-on-.description: Shows how to load XML, treat each element as a text block, and insert blank PDF pages when the accumulated character count exceeds a defined threshold.

create-pdf-toc-from-xml-headings.title: Create PDF Table of Contents from XML Headings
create-pdf-toc-from-xml-headings.description: Demonstrates loading a heading hierarchy from an XML file and generating a PDF with a tagged Table of Contents using Aspose.Pdf's logical structure API.

create-hierarchical-pdf-outline-from-xml.title: Create Hierarchical PDF Outline from XML
create-hierarchical-pdf-outline-from-xml.description: Shows how to build a nested PDF bookmark outline by reading an XML hierarchy and linking each node to a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-outline-from-xml.title: Create PDF Outline from XML Section Titles
create-pdf-outline-from-xml.description: Shows how to read section titles from an XML file, add each title to a separate PDF page, and generate corresponding outline entries for navigation.

create-pdf-bookmarks-from-xml.title: Create PDF Bookmarks from XML Hierarchy
create-pdf-bookmarks-from-xml.description: Shows how to generate a PDF outline (bookmarks) by reading an XML file and mapping its nested elements to bookmark hierarchy using Aspose.Pdf.

set-page-durations-pdf-presentation-from.title: Set Page Durations for PDF Presentation from XML
set-page-durations-pdf-presentation-from.description: Demonstrates binding an XML file to an Aspose.Pdf Document, assigning a display duration to each page for presentation mode, and saving the PDF.

set-pdf-page-duration-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Transition Duration from XML
set-pdf-page-duration-from-xml.description: Shows how to read page display durations from an XML file and assign them to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

enable-full-screen-viewer-mode.title: Enable Full‑Screen Viewer Mode for PDF Generated from XML
enable-full-screen-viewer-mode.description: Demonstrates how to load an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, set the PDF to open in full‑screen mode, define the behavior after exiting full‑screen, and save the result.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences-xml-to-pdf.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences When Converting XML to PDF
set-pdf-viewer-preferences-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with Aspose.Pdf, converting it to PDF, and configuring viewer preferences such as FitWindow and PageMode before saving.

generate-pdf-from-xml-pdf-1-7.title: Generate PDF from XML with PDF version 1.7
generate-pdf-from-xml-pdf-1-7.description: Shows how to load an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, convert it to PDF version 1.7, and save the resulting PDF.

set-pdf-permissions-restrict-printing-co.title: Set PDF Permissions to Restrict Printing and Copying
set-pdf-permissions-restrict-printing-co.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF, apply custom security permissions that block printing and content extraction, and save the encrypted PDF.

convert-xml-to-pdf-with-password-protect.title: Convert XML to PDF and Apply Password Protection
convert-xml-to-pdf-with-password-protect.description: Demonstrates converting an XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then securing the PDF with user and owner passwords and specific permissions.

digitally-sign-pdf-from-xml.title: Digitally Sign PDF Generated from XML
digitally-sign-pdf-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF, add a signature field, and apply a PKCS#7 digital signature using a PFX certificate.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml-drm.title: Encrypt PDF Generated from XML with DRM
encrypt-pdf-from-xml-drm.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, converting it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and applying DRM encryption with user/owner passwords and specific permissions before saving.

compress-pdf-streams-using-aspose-pdf.title: Compress PDF Streams Using Aspose.Pdf Optimization
compress-pdf-streams-using-aspose-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF generated from XML, enable object compression with OptimizationOptions, optimize the document resources, and save the reduced‑size PDF.

compress-pdf-from-xml-flate.title: Compress PDF from XML using Flate Compression
compress-pdf-from-xml-flate.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply Flate compression via OptimizationOptions, and save the reduced-size PDF.

compress-pdf-text-objects-from-xml.title: Compress PDF Text Objects from XML Using Aspose.Pdf Optimization
compress-pdf-text-objects-from-xml.description: Shows how to load XML content into a PDF with XmlLoadOptions, apply OptimizationOptions to compress PDF objects (including text streams), and save the compressed PDF.

downsample-images-in-pdf.title: Downsample Images in PDF to Reduce File Size
downsample-images-in-pdf.description: Shows how to compress and down‑sample high‑resolution images in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf optimization options, resulting in a smaller PDF with acceptable visual quality.

set-image-resolution-for-exported-pdf-im.title: Set Image Resolution for Exported PDF Images
set-image-resolution-for-exported-pdf-im.description: Demonstrates loading an XSL‑FO XML document into an Aspose.Pdf Document, configuring HTML export options to specify image DPI, and saving the PDF as HTML with embedded resources.

extract-base64-images-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Extract Base64 Images from XML and Embed in PDF
extract-base64-images-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, decoding Base64‑encoded images, and inserting them into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-svg-images-from-xml-into-pdf.title: Embed SVG Images from XML into PDF as Vector Graphics
embed-svg-images-from-xml-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading SVG elements embedded in an XML file, converting each to a vector‑based PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, and appending those pages to an existing PDF document.

render-html-cdata-to-pdf.title: Render HTML CDATA Fragments to PDF
render-html-cdata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XML file, extract HTML fragments stored in CDATA sections, and render each fragment into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlFragment.

create-barcodes-from-xml.title: Create Barcodes in PDF from XML Data
create-barcodes-from-xml.description: Loads barcode values from an XML file and generates a PDF with a barcode field for each entry using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-video-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Embed Video Files from XML into PDF as Rich Media Annotations
embed-video-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading video references from an XML file, creating a PDF, and embedding each video as a RichMediaAnnotation on the specified page and position.

embed-audio-annotations-from-xml.title: Embed Audio Annotations from XML into PDF
embed-audio-annotations-from-xml.description: Shows how to parse an XML file that defines audio file references and positions, then embed those audio clips as SoundAnnotation objects into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-3d-models-from-xml.title: Embed 3D Models from XML as PDF Annotations
embed-3d-models-from-xml.description: Shows how to read an XML file that lists 3D model files and embed each model as an interactive 3D annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-javascript-actions-in-pdf-from-xml.title: Embed JavaScript Actions in PDF Generated from XML
embed-javascript-actions-in-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and embedding document‑level and page‑level JavaScript actions for interactive validation.

create-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.title: Create PDF Form Fields from XML and Set Default Values
create-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read an XML definition of form fields, add them to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and assign default values to the created fields.

populate-pdf-form-from-xml-records.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML Records
populate-pdf-form-from-xml-records.description: Shows how to read multiple <Record> elements from an XML file, assign each as XFA data to a PDF form, and save a separate filled PDF for every record.

extract-plain-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Plain Text from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
extract-plain-text-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting pure text via TextAbsorber and TextExtractionOptions, and saving the result to a file for indexing.

export-pdf-pages-from-xml-to-bmp.title: Export PDF Pages from XML to BMP Images
export-pdf-pages-from-xml-to-bmp.description: Shows how to bind an XML file to an Aspose.Pdf Document, generate a PDF, and save each page as a separate BMP image file.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-thumbnails.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution PNG Thumbnails
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-thumbnails.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and render each page as a high‑resolution PNG image for thumbnail creation.

create-png-thumbnail-from-xml-pdf.title: Create PNG Thumbnail of First PDF Page from XML
create-png-thumbnail-from-xml-pdf.description: Loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF in memory using Aspose.Pdf, and generates a PNG thumbnail of the first page.

batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.title: Batch Convert XML Files to PDF
batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate over a directory of XML files and convert each file to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions and Document.Save.

merge-pdfs-from-xml-files.title: Merge PDFs Created from XML Files
merge-pdfs-from-xml-files.description: Demonstrates converting multiple XML documents to PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then merging the resulting PDFs into a single document.

split-pdf-from-xml-into-chapters.title: Split PDF Generated from XML into Chapter PDFs
split-pdf-from-xml-into-chapters.description: Shows how to convert an XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then split the resulting document into separate per‑chapter PDF files (one page per chapter).

paginate-xml-to-multiple-pdfs-bates-numb.title: Paginate Large XML to Multiple PDFs with Sequential Bates Numbering
paginate-xml-to-multiple-pdfs-bates-numb.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file as a PDF, splitting it into chunks of a fixed page count, and applying continuous Bates numbering across the generated PDF parts.

repeat-table-header-on-each-pdf-page.title: Repeat Table Header on Each PDF Page
repeat-table-header-on-each-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a table whose header row repeats on every page when the table spans multiple pages using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdfa-2b-compliance-xml-to-pdf.title: Validate PDF/A-2b Compliance After Converting XML to PDF
validate-pdfa-2b-compliance-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XML file with Aspose.Pdf, convert it to a PDF, and then validate the resulting document for PDF/A‑2b compliance, outputting a validation log.

extract-pdf-xml-representation.title: Extract PDF XML Representation
extract-pdf-xml-representation.description: Shows how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save its internal XML representation to a separate file for analysis or validation.

convert-pdf-to-html-preview.title: Convert PDF to HTML for Web Preview
convert-pdf-to-html-preview.description: Shows how to load a PDF generated from XML and save it as a single‑file HTML document using Aspose.Pdf for web preview.

convert-xml-to-pdf.title: Convert XML Files to PDF
convert-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load XML files with Aspose.Pdf.XmlLoadOptions and convert each file to a PDF document using the Document class. Includes batch processing and error handling.

convert-xml-to-pdf-with-exception-handli.title: Convert XML to PDF with Exception Handling
convert-xml-to-pdf-with-exception-handli.description: Demonstrates how to load an XML file, convert it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and handle malformed XML warnings and other errors to keep the application stable.

convert-xml-to-pdf-with-error-handling.title: Convert XML to PDF with Graceful Error Handling
convert-xml-to-pdf-with-error-handling.description: Demonstrates converting an XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while capturing parsing warnings via a custom IWarningCallback and handling errors with user‑friendly messages.

concurrent-xml-to-pdf-conversion.title: Concurrent XML to PDF Conversion with Aspose.Pdf
concurrent-xml-to-pdf-conversion.description: Demonstrates thread‑safe conversion of multiple XML files to PDF in parallel by creating a separate Aspose.Pdf Document for each task using XmlLoadOptions.

register-pdf-generation-service-di.title: Register PDF Generation Service with Dependency Injection
register-pdf-generation-service-di.description: Demonstrates how to register a PdfOutputGenerator as a singleton in the IServiceCollection and expose it via an IFileOutputGenerator interface for reuse throughout an application.

xml-to-pdf-conversion-tests.title: XML to PDF Conversion Tests with XSLT
xml-to-pdf-conversion-tests.description: Demonstrates how to convert XML documents to PDF using Aspose.Pdf with and without XSLT transformations, and provides NUnit unit tests for each scenario.

batch-xml-to-pdf-conversion-performance.title: Batch XML to PDF Conversion with Performance Profiling
batch-xml-to-pdf-conversion-performance.description: Converts multiple XML files to PDF using Aspose.Pdf while measuring per‑file and total execution time and memory consumption.

generate-pdf-with-retry-logic.title: Generate PDF with Retry Logic for Transient I/O Errors
generate-pdf-with-retry-logic.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a text fragment, and saving it while handling transient I/O failures with configurable retry and exponential back‑off.

generate-pdf-from-xml-using-xslt-config.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSLT Configured via JSON
generate-pdf-from-xml-using-xslt-config.description: Demonstrates loading an XSLT path from a JSON configuration file, applying the transformation to an XML document with Aspose.Pdf, and saving the result as a PDF.

xml-to-pdf-via-xslt-fo.title: Convert XML to PDF via XSLT and XSL‑FO using Aspose.Pdf
xml-to-pdf-via-xslt-fo.description: The example loads an XML file and an XSLT stylesheet, transforms the XML to XSL‑FO, and then creates a PDF with Aspose.Pdf. It demonstrates handling multiple XML namespaces during the transformation.

set-pdf-page-size-via-xml-processing-ins.title: Set PDF Page Size via XML Processing Instruction
set-pdf-page-size-via-xml-processing-ins.description: Demonstrates how to read a custom XML processing instruction to specify page dimensions and apply those dimensions to all pages of an Aspose.Pdf document.

generate-pdf-from-xml-xsl-fo.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSL‑FO with Aspose.Pdf
generate-pdf-from-xml-xsl-fo.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, applying an XSL‑FO template, and saving the transformed result as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-section-specific-page-margins-from.title: Apply Section-Specific Page Margins from XML
apply-section-specific-page-margins-from.description: Demonstrates how to read margin definitions from an XML file and apply different page margins to sections of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

custom-pdf-encryption-xml.title: Custom PDF Encryption with XML Input
custom-pdf-encryption-xml.description: Shows how to convert an XML file to a PDF and apply a custom encryption handler using Aspose.Pdf to protect the document with user and owner passwords.
